title: schedonorus littoralis var. triticoides
intro: Schedonorus littoralis var. triticoides, commonly known as seaside bentgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of seaside bentgrass include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of seaside bentgrass can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
